hero.title: go-i2p
hero.subtitle: ĽO I2P no Go ‚ÄĒ mea alaka Ľi, waihona puke SAM, awa, kńĀlaihana a me nńĀ mea hana.
callout.desc: ĽA Ľole hiki ke ho Ľohana i ka mea alaka Ľi go-i2p. No ka hana, e ho Ľohana i i2pd (C++) a i  Ľole Java I2P.
callout.libs: ĽO nńĀ waihona puke ho Ľohui (onramp, goSam, sam3) he pa Ľa a hana me kekahi mea alaka Ľi I2P.
cat.protocol.note: mea li Ľili Ľi ha Ľaha Ľa
cat.tunnel.note: alaka Ľi a me nńĀ mea ho Ľololi
cat.networking.note: kaula i nńĀ kńĀlaihana  Ľńď a Ľe
cat.apps.note: nńĀ mea hana mea ho Ľohana
cat.git.note: holo i nńĀ lawelawe Git ma I2P
desc.onramp: API ki Ľeki Ľe. Papa kuhikuhi i  ĽŇćlelo  Ľia.
desc.goSam: Proxy HTTP i ~50 laina. Ma Ľalahi, hiki ke ho Ľonohonoho.
desc.sam3: SAMv3.3 piha. NńĀ koho ńĀpau, nńĀ kiko Ľńę ńĀpau.
desc.go-i2p: Mea alaka Ľi I2P Go ma Ľema Ľe. 97‚ėÖ.  ĽA Ľole hiki ke ho Ľohana.
desc.common: Waihona puke ka Ľana  Ľia mai ka mea alaka Ľi.
desc.i2pkeys: MńĀlama ki I2P. Ho Ľohana  Ľia e onramp/goSam/sam3.
desc.su3: Waihona puke SU3 me ka nńĀnńĀ inoa.
desc.go-fn-dsa: Falcon-DSA i Go ma Ľema Ľe.
desc.elgamal: Huna ElGamal i Go ma Ľema Ľe.
desc.go-i2ptunnel: I2PTunnel no Go. Ho Ľololi i sam-forwarder.
desc.go-meta-dialer: Mea kelepona no clearnet, onion a me I2P.
desc.go-connfilter: Huna ho Ľohui ma ka pae net.Listener.
desc.go-forward: API ma Ľema Ľe no ka ho Ľouna/ho Ľololi pŇęnaewele.
desc.go-docker-network-i2p: Mea ho Ľokele pŇęnaewele Docker me I2P.
desc.go-i2p-teaui: TUI I2PControl hana  Ľia me BubbleTea.
desc.reseed-tools: Kahua I2P Reseed kŇę Ľoko Ľa.
desc.go-i2p-bt: BitTorrent no I2P. Like me I2PSnark.
desc.railroad: Mńękini blog me nńĀ ki Ľi Ghost.
desc.i2p-stats: Heluhelu a me ka ho Ľohui helu mea alaka Ľi.
desc.gitlab-to-gitea: Ho Ľololi waihona mai GitLab i Gitea.
desc.go-git-transport: Ka Ľa  Ľńď a Ľe no git.
desc.logger: NńĀ mea hana palapala no go-i2p.
desc.util: NńĀ hana kŇćkua  Ľa Ľole kŇępono i wahi  Ľńď a Ľe.
desc.checki2cp: E nńĀnńĀ i ka I2CP. CLI + waihona puke.
maturity.onramp: mature, implements SAMv3.3, Streaming and Datagrams
maturity.go-sam-go: mature, implements SAMv3.3, Streaming and Datagrams
maturity.go-i2pcontrol: mature but does not provide all possible consts (like ratestats)
section.interface_note: Connection libraries act as drop-in replacements for net.Conn and net.PacketConn in your Go code. When used correctly, they make it easy to adapt Go applications to I2P.
